## Description

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead? Include error messages, screenshots, or relevant logs if available.

## Additional Context

Add any other context that may help diagnose the issue, such as whether Chrome remote debugging was enabled through `chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` or launched with `--remote-debugging-port=9222`.
